nl_query: For each script with an active legal hold, show the hold duration in days, whether the hold overlaps with the board evaluation deadline, whether the script has already been published, and the case reference number.
failed_sql: SELECT sh.id, sh.script_id, a.urn, sh.case_id, sh.hold_reason, sh.hold_start_date, (CURRENT_DATE - sh.hold_start_date) AS days_held, b.deadline AS board_deadline, a.lifecycle_status, a.is_held, sh.case_id AS case_reference_number FROM script_hold sh JOIN answer_script a ON a.id = sh.script_id JOIN board b ON b.id = a.board_id WHERE sh.is_active = TRUE AND sh.released_at IS NULL AND sh.case_id IS NOT NULL
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): script_hold.board_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
